description: Local self-contained registry of the 526 factor definitions used by USalpha.

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA010_RANK_WHERE_TSMIN_DELTA_CLOSE_TSMAX
factors.expression: rank((where((0 < ts_min(delta(close, 1), 4)), delta(close, 1), where((ts_max(delta(close, 1), 4) < 0), delta(close, 1), (-1 * delta(close, 1))))))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA020_RANK_OPEN_DELAY_HIGH_CLOSE_LOW
factors.expression: (((-1 * rank((open - delay(high, 1)))) * rank((open - delay(close, 1)))) * rank((open - delay(low, 1))))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA021_WHERE_SUM_CLOSE_STDDEV_VOLUME_ADV
factors.expression: (where((((sum(close, 8) / 8) + stddev(close, 8)) < (sum(close, 2) / 2)), (-1 * 1), where(((sum(close, 2) / 2) < ((sum(close, 8) / 8) - stddev(close, 8))), 1, where((((1 < (volume / adv20)) | ((volume / adv20) == 1))), 1, (-1 * 1)))))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA030_RANK_SIGN_CLOSE_DELAY_SUM_VOLUME
factors.expression: (((1.0 - rank(((sign((close - delay(close, 1))) + sign((delay(close, 1) - delay(close, 2)))) + sign((delay(close, 2) - delay(close, 3)))))) * sum(volume, 5)) / sum(volume, 20))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA036_RANK_CORRELATION_CLOSE_OPEN_DELAY_VOLUME
factors.expression: (((((2.21 * rank(correlation((close - open), delay(volume, 1), 15))) + (0.7 * rank((open - close)))) + (0.73 * rank(Ts_Rank(delay((-1 * returns), 6), 5)))) + rank(abs(correlation(vwap, adv20, 6)))) + (0.6 * rank((((sum(close, 200) / 200) - open) * (close - open)))))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA046_WHERE_DELAY_CLOSE
factors.expression: (where((0.25 < (((delay(close, 20) - delay(close, 10)) / 10) - ((delay(close, 10) - close) / 10))), (-1 * 1), where(((((delay(close, 20) - delay(close, 10)) / 10) - ((delay(close, 10) - close) / 10)) < 0), 1, ((-1 * 1) * (close - delay(close, 1))))))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA047_RANK_CLOSE_VOLUME_ADV_HIGH_SUM
factors.expression: ((((rank((1 / close)) * volume) / adv20) * ((high * rank((high - close))) / (sum(high, 5) / 5))) - rank((vwap - delay(vwap, 5))))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA048_INDNEUTRALIZE_CORRELATION_DELTA_CLOSE_DELAY_SUM
factors.expression: (indneutralize(((correlation(delta(close, 1), delta(delay(close, 1), 1), 250) * delta(close, 1)) / close), IndClass.subindustry) / sum(((delta(close, 1) / delay(close, 1))^2), 250))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA060_SCALE_RANK_CLOSE_LOW_HIGH_VOLUME
factors.expression: (0 - (1 * ((2 * scale(rank(((((close - low) - (high - close)) / (high - low)) * volume)))) - scale(rank(ts_argmax(close, 10))))))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA077_MIN_RANK_DECAYLINEAR_HIGH_LOW_VWAP
factors.expression: min(rank(decay_linear(((((high + low) / 2) + high) - (vwap + high)), 20.0451)), rank(decay_linear(correlation(((high + low) / 2), adv40, 3.1614), 5.64125)))

factors.name: WQ_ALPHA100_SCALE_INDNEUTRALIZE_RANK_CLOSE_LOW_HIGH
factors.expression: (0 - (1 * (((1.5 * scale(indneutralize(indneutralize(rank(((((close - low) - (high - close)) / (high - low)) * volume)), IndClass.subindustry), IndClass.subindustry))) - scale(indneutralize((correlation(close, rank(adv20), 5) - rank(ts_argmin(close, 30))), IndClass.subindustry))) * (volume / adv20))))

factors.name: GTJA_ALPHA_048
factors.expression: (-1*((RANK(((SIGN((CLOSE - DELAY(CLOSE, 1))) + SIGN((DELAY(CLOSE, 1) - DELAY(CLOSE, 2)))) + SIGN((DELAY(CLOSE, 2) - DELAY(CLOSE, 3)))))) * SUM(VOLUME, 5)) / SUM(VOLUME, 20))

factors.name: GTJA_ALPHA_077
factors.expression: MIN(RANK(DECAYLINEAR(((((HIGH + LOW) / 2) + HIGH) - (VWAP + HIGH)), 20)), RANK(DECAYLINEAR(CORR(((HIGH + LOW) / 2), MEAN(VOLUME,40), 3), 6)))

factors.name: GTJA_ALPHA_107
factors.expression: (((-1 * RANK((OPEN - DELAY(HIGH, 1)))) * RANK((OPEN - DELAY(CLOSE, 1)))) * RANK((OPEN - DELAY(LOW, 1))))

factors.name: GTJA_ALPHA_170
factors.expression: ((((RANK((1 / CLOSE)) * VOLUME) / MEAN(VOLUME,20)) * ((HIGH * RANK((HIGH - CLOSE))) / (SUM(HIGH, 5) / 5))) - RANK((VWAP - DELAY(VWAP , 5))))
